CustomField.description: Please note: The data stored in this field is linked to the HomeKeeper National Data Hub. Total adjustments that affect Purchase Option Price but are not related to the property value. For example, a ground lease reissuance fee or transfer fee.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Total adjustments that affect Purchase Option Price but are not related to the property value. For example, a ground lease reissuance fee or transfer fee.
CustomField.label: Other Adjustments
